introSection: Mad Mouse was a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster which operated at White Swan Park and later at Lakemont Park.

sections.title: History
sections.content: This roller coaster operated at White Swan Park from 1965 until the closure of the park in 1989. It stood standing but not operating for much of 1990 and was subsequently sold to Lakemont Park, where it opened in 1991. The ride was closed in 2003 and sold to a carnival operator who had planned to refurbish it. The ride was ultimately stolen and sold as scrap.

fullText:
Mad Mouse was a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster which operated at White Swan Park and later at Lakemont Park.

This roller coaster operated at White Swan Park from 1965 until the closure of the park in 1989. It stood standing but not operating for much of 1990 and was subsequently sold to Lakemont Park, where it opened in 1991. The ride was closed in 2003 and sold to a carnival operator who had planned to refurbish it. The ride was ultimately stolen and sold as scrap.



Red track and white supports.
